name: breadcrumb-separator
visual_summary: A breadcrumb separator is a small UI element used to separate individual items in a breadcrumb trail. It provides clear visual distinction between breadcrumbs, aiding navigation through hierarchical structures. Developers use this component to emphasize breaks between breadcrumb categories.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Description: A breadcrumb separator is a small UI element used to separate individual items in a breadcrumb trail. It provides clear visual distinction between breadcrumbs, aiding navigation through hierarchical structures. Developers use this component to emphasize breaks between breadcrumb categories.
Style: minimal

Tags: breadcrumb, navigation, ui-element
